channel.title: Language Transfer Spanish
channel.description: Please share far and wide and help us get this wonderful free resource out to as many people as possible! Please help support and shape LT for as little as $1 a month whilst voting for the next course to be created with The Thinking Method! www.patreon.com/languagetransfer
channel.itunes:author: Language Transfer
channel.itunes:summary: Hosted mirror for Language Transfer's Complete Spanish lessons.

item.title: Complete Spanish 90
item.description: Closes with dialect differences such as leísmo and vosotros and how regional variation fits into the larger system.
item.content:encoded: Closes with dialect differences such as leísmo and vosotros and how regional variation fits into the larger system.

item.title: Complete Spanish 89
item.description: Encourages making your own rules from patterns so you can keep learning beyond the course.
item.content:encoded: Encourages making your own rules from patterns so you can keep learning beyond the course.

item.title: Complete Spanish 88
item.description: Covers irregular preterite stems like pus- in poner.
item.content:encoded: Covers irregular preterite stems like pus- in poner.

item.title: Complete Spanish 87
item.description: Reviews irregular imperfect forms such as era and other line-in-the-past irregulars.
item.content:encoded: Reviews irregular imperfect forms such as era and other line-in-the-past irregulars.

item.title: Complete Spanish 86
item.description: Shows how go-verbs also behave differently in the future and conditional.
item.content:encoded: Shows how go-verbs also behave differently in the future and conditional.

item.title: Complete Spanish 85
item.description: Reviews go-verbs in the subjunctive and in formal commands like salga and ponga.
item.content:encoded: Reviews go-verbs in the subjunctive and in formal commands like salga and ponga.

item.title: Complete Spanish 84
item.description: Wraps up the full tense and mood system and emphasizes active listening and analysis.
item.content:encoded: Wraps up the full tense and mood system and emphasizes active listening and analysis.

item.title: Complete Spanish 83
item.description: Practices the past subjunctive in sentences about what someone may have bought or done.
item.content:encoded: Practices the past subjunctive in sentences about what someone may have bought or done.

item.title: Complete Spanish 82
item.description: Uses the subjunctive after evaluations like no es muy relevante que and está bien que.
item.content:encoded: Uses the subjunctive after evaluations like no es muy relevante que and está bien que.

item.title: Complete Spanish 81
item.description: Practices the subjunctive after no quiero que with reflexive verbs like cerrarse.
item.content:encoded: Practices the subjunctive after no quiero que with reflexive verbs like cerrarse.

item.title: Complete Spanish 80
item.description: Reviews the many uses of se, from sé to reflexive se and pronoun-replacement se.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the many uses of se, from sé to reflexive se and pronoun-replacement se.

item.title: Complete Spanish 79
item.description: Reviews subjunctive triggers with dejar and message or command sentences.
item.content:encoded: Reviews subjunctive triggers with dejar and message or command sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 78
item.description: Shows how seguir plus gerund works and how phrases like es probable que trigger the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Shows how seguir plus gerund works and how phrases like es probable que trigger the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 77
item.description: Practices should and should have constructions such as debería haber.
item.content:encoded: Practices should and should have constructions such as debería haber.

item.title: Complete Spanish 76
item.description: Introduces hay for there is and there are and uses it with words like alguien.
item.content:encoded: Introduces hay for there is and there are and uses it with words like alguien.

item.title: Complete Spanish 75
item.description: Covers irregular informal commands like haz and extends the subjunctive to words like wherever.
item.content:encoded: Covers irregular informal commands like haz and extends the subjunctive to words like wherever.

item.title: Complete Spanish 74
item.description: Introduces e to i verbs like elegir inside the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Introduces e to i verbs like elegir inside the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 73
item.description: Explains positive informal commands, let us forms, and the main command patterns.
item.content:encoded: Explains positive informal commands, let us forms, and the main command patterns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 72
item.description: Uses negative commands to introduce the subjunctive in everyday orders.
item.content:encoded: Uses negative commands to introduce the subjunctive in everyday orders.

item.title: Complete Spanish 71
item.description: Introduces contar and cuento and practices asking someone to tell you something.
item.content:encoded: Introduces contar and cuento and practices asking someone to tell you something.

item.title: Complete Spanish 70
item.description: Shows how lo que works for what in statements and how querer que triggers the subjunctive.
item.content:encoded: Shows how lo que works for what in statements and how querer que triggers the subjunctive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 69
item.description: Reviews the full panorama of Spanish tenses and introduces the subjunctive as the final major mood.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the full panorama of Spanish tenses and introduces the subjunctive as the final major mood.

item.title: Complete Spanish 68
item.description: Introduces demonstratives like este, ese, esta, and esa and how they match the noun.
item.content:encoded: Introduces demonstratives like este, ese, esta, and esa and how they match the noun.

item.title: Complete Spanish 67
item.description: Focuses on reading and spelling patterns in Spanish through cognates and sound rules.
item.content:encoded: Focuses on reading and spelling patterns in Spanish through cognates and sound rules.

item.title: Complete Spanish 66
item.description: Explains possession in Spanish, especially with body parts and the verb doler.
item.content:encoded: Explains possession in Spanish, especially with body parts and the verb doler.

item.title: Complete Spanish 65
item.description: Teaches nada más and nadie más while reinforcing Spanish double negatives.
item.content:encoded: Teaches nada más and nadie más while reinforcing Spanish double negatives.

item.title: Complete Spanish 64
item.description: Uses hace for ago and practices responder with indirect objects.
item.content:encoded: Uses hace for ago and practices responder with indirect objects.

item.title: Complete Spanish 63
item.description: Introduces acordarse and practices saying I remember and I do not remember.
item.content:encoded: Introduces acordarse and practices saying I remember and I do not remember.

item.title: Complete Spanish 62
item.description: Covers dar as a preterite irregular and practices pronouns with forms like dio.
item.content:encoded: Covers dar as a preterite irregular and practices pronouns with forms like dio.

item.title: Complete Spanish 61
item.description: Combines the imperfect and the preterite in sentences like I was cooking when the phone rang.
item.content:encoded: Combines the imperfect and the preterite in sentences like I was cooking when the phone rang.

item.title: Complete Spanish 60
item.description: Explains that hablamos can mean either we speak or we spoke and shows how context resolves it.
item.content:encoded: Explains that hablamos can mean either we speak or we spoke and shows how context resolves it.

item.title: Complete Spanish 59
item.description: Practices preterite endings with verbs like comer and salir while emphasizing stress.
item.content:encoded: Practices preterite endings with verbs like comer and salir while emphasizing stress.

item.title: Complete Spanish 58
item.description: Introduces the preterite as the point-in-the-past tense and sets up its endings.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the preterite as the point-in-the-past tense and sets up its endings.

item.title: Complete Spanish 57
item.description: Reviews the present-tense we forms and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.
item.content:encoded: Reviews the present-tense we forms and the one key difference between -er and -ir verbs.

item.title: Complete Spanish 56
item.description: Reviews prepositions and shows that Spanish does not strand them at the ends of sentences.
item.content:encoded: Reviews prepositions and shows that Spanish does not strand them at the ends of sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 55
item.description: Uses forms like está cancelado to show how past participles behave like adjectives.
item.content:encoded: Uses forms like está cancelado to show how past participles behave like adjectives.

item.title: Complete Spanish 54
item.description: Shows how past participles after haber also work as adjectives and in phrases like me gustaría haber ido.
item.content:encoded: Shows how past participles after haber also work as adjectives and in phrases like me gustaría haber ido.

item.title: Complete Spanish 53
item.description: Contrasts past could with conditional could by using podía versus podría.
item.content:encoded: Contrasts past could with conditional could by using podía versus podría.

item.title: Complete Spanish 52
item.description: Teaches para plus infinitive for in order to constructions.
item.content:encoded: Teaches para plus infinitive for in order to constructions.

item.title: Complete Spanish 51
item.description: Distinguishes para and por through phrases like estoy para ti and estoy aquí por ti.
item.content:encoded: Distinguishes para and por through phrases like estoy para ti and estoy aquí por ti.

item.title: Complete Spanish 50
item.description: Uses gracias por venir to contrast por and para and show when each kind of for is used.
item.content:encoded: Uses gracias por venir to contrast por and para and show when each kind of for is used.

item.title: Complete Spanish 49
item.description: Introduces llamar for making phone calls and saying what someone is called.
item.content:encoded: Introduces llamar for making phone calls and saying what someone is called.

item.title: Complete Spanish 48
item.description: Teaches the imperfect -ía pattern for -er and -ir verbs and expressions like se vende.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the imperfect -ía pattern for -er and -ir verbs and expressions like se vende.

item.title: Complete Spanish 47
item.description: Teaches the imperfect -aba pattern with verbs like cenar and quemar.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the imperfect -aba pattern with verbs like cenar and quemar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 46
item.description: Introduces the two main simple past viewpoints: the line in the past and the point in the past.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the two main simple past viewpoints: the line in the past and the point in the past.

item.title: Complete Spanish 45
item.description: Expands gustar with nos gusta and le gusta to show how liking works through indirect objects.
item.content:encoded: Expands gustar with nos gusta and le gusta to show how liking works through indirect objects.

item.title: Complete Spanish 44
item.description: Covers masculine Greek-origin nouns ending in -ma and related word families like problema and sistema.
item.content:encoded: Covers masculine Greek-origin nouns ending in -ma and related word families like problema and sistema.

item.title: Complete Spanish 43
item.description: Builds the conditional perfect with habría plus a past participle to say things like I would have gone.
item.content:encoded: Builds the conditional perfect with habría plus a past participle to say things like I would have gone.

item.title: Complete Spanish 42
item.description: Introduces the conditional endings and re-frames gustar as meaning to be pleasing.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the conditional endings and re-frames gustar as meaning to be pleasing.

item.title: Complete Spanish 41
item.description: Revisits ways to talk about the future and practices ir a plus infinitive with verbs like bailar.
item.content:encoded: Revisits ways to talk about the future and practices ir a plus infinitive with verbs like bailar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 40
item.description: Explores how prepositions can change meaning between languages, including enamorarse de.
item.content:encoded: Explores how prepositions can change meaning between languages, including enamorarse de.

item.title: Complete Spanish 39
item.description: Introduces prepositions with pronouns, such as con él, con nosotros, and para ella.
item.content:encoded: Introduces prepositions with pronouns, such as con él, con nosotros, and para ella.

item.title: Complete Spanish 38
item.description: Explains how lo, la, los, and las become le or les and reviews reflexive and reciprocal pronouns.
item.content:encoded: Explains how lo, la, los, and las become le or les and reviews reflexive and reciprocal pronouns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 37
item.description: Introduces the simple future tense and practices it with dar and object pronouns.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the simple future tense and practices it with dar and object pronouns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 36
item.description: Shows how to express the future with the present or ir a plus infinitive.
item.content:encoded: Shows how to express the future with the present or ir a plus infinitive.

item.title: Complete Spanish 35
item.description: Explores how adjectives like sincero can take ser or estar depending on whether you mean a trait or a state.
item.content:encoded: Explores how adjectives like sincero can take ser or estar depending on whether you mean a trait or a state.

item.title: Complete Spanish 34
item.description: Reviews common verbs and introduces desayunar along with everyday actions like sleeping, eating, and speaking.
item.content:encoded: Reviews common verbs and introduces desayunar along with everyday actions like sleeping, eating, and speaking.

item.title: Complete Spanish 33
item.description: Continues ser and estar with listo and other adjectives whose meaning changes with the verb.
item.content:encoded: Continues ser and estar with listo and other adjectives whose meaning changes with the verb.

item.title: Complete Spanish 32
item.description: Uses aburrido to show how ser and estar can change a word from a characteristic to a state.
item.content:encoded: Uses aburrido to show how ser and estar can change a word from a characteristic to a state.

item.title: Complete Spanish 31
item.description: Continues the ser and estar distinction and highlights the extra e that appears before s plus consonant in Spanish.
item.content:encoded: Continues the ser and estar distinction and highlights the extra e that appears before s plus consonant in Spanish.

item.title: Complete Spanish 30
item.description: Practices estar in common questions and location phrases like cómo estás and dónde estamos.
item.content:encoded: Practices estar in common questions and location phrases like cómo estás and dónde estamos.

item.title: Complete Spanish 29
item.description: Introduces the big contrast between ser and estar and the idea of two different verbs for to be.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the big contrast between ser and estar and the idea of two different verbs for to be.

item.title: Complete Spanish 28
item.description: Covers regional vocabulary differences and alternative everyday words used across the Spanish-speaking world.
item.content:encoded: Covers regional vocabulary differences and alternative everyday words used across the Spanish-speaking world.

item.title: Complete Spanish 27
item.description: Introduces adjective placement after nouns and builds phrases like la situación global.
item.content:encoded: Introduces adjective placement after nouns and builds phrases like la situación global.

item.title: Complete Spanish 26
item.description: Practices quedarse, voy a plus infinitive, and time expressions like until seven.
item.content:encoded: Practices quedarse, voy a plus infinitive, and time expressions like until seven.

item.title: Complete Spanish 25
item.description: Teaches how me, te, and nos work as me, to me, and myself in sentences with hablar.
item.content:encoded: Teaches how me, te, and nos work as me, to me, and myself in sentences with hablar.

item.title: Complete Spanish 24
item.description: Introduces dar and practices combining give with direct and indirect object pronouns.
item.content:encoded: Introduces dar and practices combining give with direct and indirect object pronouns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 23
item.description: Reviews all the haber forms for the present perfect while also noting masculine nouns ending in -ma.
item.content:encoded: Reviews all the haber forms for the present perfect while also noting masculine nouns ending in -ma.

item.title: Complete Spanish 22
item.description: Practices he plus past participles with terminar and other verbs in the present perfect.
item.content:encoded: Practices he plus past participles with terminar and other verbs in the present perfect.

item.title: Complete Spanish 21
item.description: Introduces the present perfect with haber as a present form used to speak about the past.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the present perfect with haber as a present form used to speak about the past.

item.title: Complete Spanish 20
item.description: Shows how Spanish uses the present to talk about the future and introduces ver with future context words.
item.content:encoded: Shows how Spanish uses the present to talk about the future and introduces ver with future context words.

item.title: Complete Spanish 19
item.description: Teaches common words like siempre and bien while reinforcing sound changes and word families across languages.
item.content:encoded: Teaches common words like siempre and bien while reinforcing sound changes and word families across languages.

item.title: Complete Spanish 18
item.description: Introduces nosotros forms and the key difference between -er and -ir verbs in the we form.
item.content:encoded: Introduces nosotros forms and the key difference between -er and -ir verbs in the we form.

item.title: Complete Spanish 17
item.description: Expands stem-changing verbs with querer and perder and practices asking what someone wants or loses.
item.content:encoded: Expands stem-changing verbs with querer and perder and practices asking what someone wants or loses.

item.title: Complete Spanish 16
item.description: Introduces comenzar and empezar and teaches the e to ie stem change in the present tense.
item.content:encoded: Introduces comenzar and empezar and teaches the e to ie stem change in the present tense.

item.title: Complete Spanish 15
item.description: Uses qué and pasar to ask what is happening and to distinguish present from past meanings like qué pasó.
item.content:encoded: Uses qué and pasar to ask what is happening and to distinguish present from past meanings like qué pasó.

item.title: Complete Spanish 14
item.description: Teaches the irregular yo form sé and combines saber with querer in longer sentences.
item.content:encoded: Teaches the irregular yo form sé and combines saber with querer in longer sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 13
item.description: Introduces hacer and shows how spotting a verb ending tells you how to work with a new verb.
item.content:encoded: Introduces hacer and shows how spotting a verb ending tells you how to work with a new verb.

item.title: Complete Spanish 12
item.description: Reviews present-tense patterns and contrasts the key vowels used for -ar and -er or -ir verbs.
item.content:encoded: Reviews present-tense patterns and contrasts the key vowels used for -ar and -er or -ir verbs.

item.title: Complete Spanish 11
item.description: Explains how regular -ar, -er, and -ir verbs form the I version in the present tense.
item.content:encoded: Explains how regular -ar, -er, and -ir verbs form the I version in the present tense.

item.title: Complete Spanish 10
item.description: Adds new cognate verbs such as ventilar, separar, saber, and venir while reinforcing present-tense patterns.
item.content:encoded: Adds new cognate verbs such as ventilar, separar, saber, and venir while reinforcing present-tense patterns.

item.title: Complete Spanish 09
item.description: Introduces saber and practices saying who wants to know and what someone knows.
item.content:encoded: Introduces saber and practices saying who wants to know and what someone knows.

item.title: Complete Spanish 08
item.description: Introduces feminine forms like la and explains that gender belongs to words rather than to objects.
item.content:encoded: Introduces feminine forms like la and explains that gender belongs to words rather than to objects.

item.title: Complete Spanish 07
item.description: Uses continuar to practice infinitives, object pronouns, and building longer sentences without memorizing.
item.content:encoded: Uses continuar to practice infinitives, object pronouns, and building longer sentences without memorizing.

item.title: Complete Spanish 06
item.description: Introduces intento and shows how to infer unfamiliar verbs from related English words to say I am trying to do something.
item.content:encoded: Introduces intento and shows how to infer unfamiliar verbs from related English words to say I am trying to do something.

item.title: Complete Spanish 05
item.description: Introduces yo for emphasis and uses quiero plus infinitives to say things like I do not want to cancel or celebrate.
item.content:encoded: Introduces yo for emphasis and uses quiero plus infinitives to say things like I do not want to cancel or celebrate.

item.title: Complete Spanish 04
item.description: Builds on cognates while teaching quiero, no quiero, and te quiero for expressing wants and affection.
item.content:encoded: Builds on cognates while teaching quiero, no quiero, and te quiero for expressing wants and affection.

item.title: Complete Spanish 03
item.description: Shows how -ant and -ent words become Spanish cognates and how to use es with descriptive words.
item.content:encoded: Shows how -ant and -ent words become Spanish cognates and how to use es with descriptive words.

item.title: Complete Spanish 02
item.description: Introduces Latin-based cognates, Spanish vowel sounds, and the verb es to build simple sentences.
item.content:encoded: Introduces Latin-based cognates, Spanish vowel sounds, and the verb es to build simple sentences.

item.title: Complete Spanish 01
item.description: Introduces the Thinking Method and explains how to work through the course by pausing, thinking, and avoiding memorization.
item.content:encoded: Introduces the Thinking Method and explains how to work through the course by pausing, thinking, and avoiding memorization.
